title: rosa carolina f. plena
intro: Rosa carolina f. plena, also known as Carolina Rose Double, is a cultivar of the Rosa carolina, a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is known for its fragrant, double-petaled flowers and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The Rosa carolina f. plena is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall health. In herbal preparations, the flowers can be used to make teas, salves, and infusions that are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
